title: Why Inventing General Relativity Is the Final Test for AI - Adam Brown
summary: Adam Brown argues that inventing General Relativity represents a fundamental test of AI capability. The framing positions major scientific breakthroughs as a benchmark for evaluating whether AI has achieved genuine scientific reasoning and discovery.
